column2: create_minmax_plot <- function(model, term, labels, plot_title, dot_color) {
ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(x, levels = unique(x), labels = labels), y = predicted)) +
geom_hline(yintercept = mean(df$predicted), color = "grey60", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.35, 0.9), breaks = seq(0.4, 0.9, .1), labels = scales::percent) +
plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16), # Bumped from 13 to 16
axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),            # Bumped up the Pr(Turnout) label
axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),             # Bumped general tick numbers to 12
axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold") # Flattened, centered, and enlarged the Min/Max labels!
p_D <- create_minmax_plot(mm3, "partisanship", c("Party Closeness:\nNo", "Party Closeness:\nYes"), "Party Closeness", magma_pal[1])
ggsave(here("Output", "Article", "pred_prob.png"), plot = figure2, width = 12, height = 16, dpi = 600)
